345 GG0170H1_RSDNT_WLK_STRT_CD GG0170H1_RSDNT_WLK_STRT_CD GG0170H1 Admission Performance Patient Walk Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at the time of admission. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or
